Test name: CMOncoming (lateral speed 0.4 m/s)

Test Description

The scenario represents the passenger car drifting into the lane of the motorcycle which is coming from the opposite direction.

  • Regulation or protocol: ASEAN NCAP
  • Ego speed: 72 km/h
  • Target speed: 60 km/h
  • Lateral speed: 0.4 m/s
